tasks.label: clean (Debug)
tasks.comment: Safe clean: removes build OUTPUTS only. NOT 'make clean' — the CubeIDE clean target is 'rm -rf *' which also deletes the committed makefile/*.mk/objects.list.
tasks.command: find Debug -type f \( -name '*.o' -o -name '*.d' -o -name '*.su' \) -delete && rm -f Debug/motorcontrol.elf Debug/motorcontrol.bin Debug/motorcontrol.map Debug/motorcontrol.list Debug/default.size.stdout

tasks.label: flash (Debug)
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/stlink.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c "program Debug/motorcontrol.elf verify reset exit"
